question: Use add_module to dynamically register submodules to a parent module. Register 3 Linear layers with names 'layer_0', 'layer_1', 'layer_2', then print all named children using named_children().
expected_output:
layer_0: Linear
layer_1: Linear
layer_2: Linear
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

model = nn.Module()
for i in range(3):
    layer = nn.Linear(10, 10)
    ???(f'layer_{i}', layer)

for name, module in model.???():
    print(f"{name}: {module.__class__.__name__}")
